title: New Plymouth Deals
meta_desc: Discover the best family deals in New Plymouth & Taranaki, including activity discounts, campervan hire, and travel insurance, to make your family holiday more affordable and enjoyable, with prices from $89/day for campervans and up to 40% off activities on Bookme.co.nz
intro: New Plymouth and Taranaki are a hidden family gem, offering a range of activities and attractions that cater to all ages, from the stunning Mt Taranaki to the beautiful Pukekura Park. With the right deals and discounts, your family holiday can be both fun and affordable. In this article, we will explore the current booking deals and discounts available for families planning to visit New Plymouth and Taranaki.

sections.heading: Current Booking Deals
sections.body:
Currently, there are several deals available for families planning to visit New Plymouth and Taranaki. Bookme Activity Discounts are offering up to 40% off activities in Rotorua, Queenstown, Bay of Islands, and Auckland, which can be a great way to save money on your family's activities.

Discover Cars Campervan Deals are also available, with family campervans starting from $89/day, allowing you to compare prices from Jucy, Maui, Britz, and Mighty in one search.

Additionally, Booking.com Holiday Parks are offering free cancellation on most bookings, providing you with more flexibility when planning your family holiday.
list: Up to 40% off activities on Bookme.co.nz
Family campervans from $89/day on Discover Cars
Free cancellation on most holiday park bookings on Booking.com

sections.heading: Best-Value Activities
sections.body:
Some of the best-value activities for families in New Plymouth and Taranaki include visiting Pukekura Park, which is free and offers a boating lake, playground, and zoo, as well as the New Plymouth coastal walkway, which is also free and spans 13km along the dramatic black sand surf beaches.

The Govett-Brewster Art Gallery / Len Lye Centre is another great option, with free entry and a range of exhibits and activities for kids.
list: Pukekura Park: free park with boating lake, playground, and zoo
New Plymouth coastal walkway: free, 13km, cyclable
Govett-Brewster Art Gallery / Len Lye Centre: free entry

sections.heading: Money-Saving Tips
sections.body:
To make the most of your family holiday in New Plymouth and Taranaki, here are some money-saving tips to keep in mind.

Firstly, consider booking your activities and accommodation outside of peak season to get the best prices.

Secondly, look for package deals that include multiple activities or services, as these can often be cheaper than booking each component separately.

Thirdly, take advantage of free activities such as visiting Pukekura Park or walking along the coastal walkway.

Fourthly, book your campervan or accommodation in advance to get the best prices.

Fifthly, consider purchasing a family travel insurance policy to protect against unexpected costs or cancellations.

Sixthly, use a price comparison website such as Bookme.co.nz to find the cheapest prices for activities and services.
list: Book outside of peak season for best prices
Look for package deals to save money
Book campervans or accommodation in advance

sections.heading: When to Book
sections.body:
To get the best prices for your family holiday in New Plymouth and Taranaki, it's a good idea to book your activities and accommodation as early as possible.

Many booking websites, such as Bookme.co.nz and Discover Cars, offer discounts for early bookings, so it's worth planning ahead to make the most of these deals.

Additionally, booking in advance can help you avoid peak season price increases and ensure that you get the accommodation and activities you want.
